inputs.label: Spot Price
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of the underlying asset per unit.

inputs.label: Futures Price
inputs.businessContext: Futures contract price for delivery at a future date.

inputs.label: Spot Volatility (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Annualized standard deviation of spot price returns.

inputs.label: Futures Volatility (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Annualized standard deviation of futures price returns.

inputs.label: Correlation
inputs.businessContext: Correlation coefficient between spot and futures returns.

inputs.label: Exposure (Units)
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of the asset to hedge (e.g., bushels, barrels).

inputs.label: Contract Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of units of the underlying asset per futures contract.
